title: Monday cusotm automation - Option to give a new group name each recurring time
excerpt: When creating a new custom automation, that creates a new group every X time, or when something happens recurringly, I would like to see also an option to give a new Group Name each time.

posts.author: Chen_Lissan (Chen)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating a new custom automation, that creates a new group every X time, or when something happens recurringly, I would like to see also an option to give a new Group Name each time.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Chen,
One workaround would be to use the “Item Name” as the name for each new group by clicking on it within the group section of your chosen recipe
Cheers,
Harsh
